description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pushes to tags, the 'master' branch, and pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to run a job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, macos-13, macos-14, windows-2022) with different build types and architectures. For each OS, install dependencies, build the project, and upload artifacts. Configure ccache, vcpkg, and Qt. Handle macOS signing and notarization. Create a release with uploaded assets.
